note: Simple XML Sitemap exposes a generator service, two plugin types, drush commands, config entities and permissions. All cases are `recipe` (response-graded), not `execution` (no live-state mutation).

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site with Simple XML Sitemap installed, I want to (re)generate all XML sitemaps from the command line. Give the single drush command (an alias is fine).
evals.expected_output: drush simple-sitemap:generate (alias drush ssg) regenerates all sitemaps, continuing any in-progress queue generation.

evals.prompt: With Simple XML Sitemap, I want to truncate and re-populate the generation queue for only the `default` and `news` sitemaps, without generating yet. Give the drush command including the flag to scope it to those variants.
evals.expected_output: drush simple-sitemap:rebuild-queue --variants=default,news (alias drush ssr) rebuilds the queue for just those variants.

evals.prompt: In PHP on a Drupal 11 site, I want to programmatically trigger Simple XML Sitemap generation and read a global setting. Which service do I load, and what is its class? Show the service id.

In custom code on a Drupal 11 site, enable the `node` entity type for Simple XML Sitemap indexing and set the `article` bundle to be indexed with priority 0.5 and changefreq weekly. Which manager and methods do I use?
evals.expected_output: Use the generator's entityManager() (Drupal\simple_sitemap\Manager\EntityManager): ->enableEntityType('node') then ->setBundleSettings('node', 'article', ['index' => TRUE, 'priority' => 0.5, 'changefreq' => 'weekly']).

evals.prompt: I want to write a custom plugin for Simple XML Sitemap that produces the list of links to index. What plugin type is that, what is its plugin namespace, and what annotation/base class do I use?
evals.expected_output: A UrlGenerator plugin in namespace Plugin/simple_sitemap/UrlGenerator, using the @UrlGenerator annotation and extending UrlGeneratorBase (or EntityUrlGeneratorBase).

evals.prompt: For Simple XML Sitemap, which plugin type writes the actual XML document, what is its plugin namespace, and what is the id of its plugin manager service?
evals.expected_output: A SitemapGenerator plugin (namespace Plugin/simple_sitemap/SitemapGenerator, @SitemapGenerator annotation, SitemapGeneratorBase base), managed by plugin.manager.simple_sitemap.sitemap_generator.

evals.prompt: For Simple XML Sitemap, I want editors to be able to toggle sitemap inclusion on individual entity edit forms but NOT reach the full admin UI. Name the two permission machine names the module defines and which one to grant.
evals.expected_output: Grant 'edit entity sitemap settings' (per-entity toggle) rather than 'administer sitemap settings' (full admin UI).

evals.prompt: Which Simple XML Sitemap submodule adds search-engine submission / IndexNow, and which one adds Views route integration? Name both submodule machine names.
evals.expected_output: simple_sitemap_engines adds search-engine submission/IndexNow (and the 'index entity on save' permission); simple_sitemap_views adds Views route integration (the `views` URL generator).
